g.onclick: sendPrompt('What datasets should I use for substance abuse risk detection?')
sendPrompt('How do I use CDC overdose data in my pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What NIDA datasets are useful for substance abuse analysis?')
sendPrompt('How do I use the Kaggle drug dataset from the hackathon?')
sendPrompt('How should I preprocess social media text for substance abuse detection?')
g.text: Text cleaning · Slang normalization · PII scrubbing · Deduplication
Slang lexicon (bars, lean, H, molly…) · Remove URLs, usernames · Timestamp extraction

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I build a rule-based substance abuse classifier?')
sendPrompt('How do I build an embedding-based classifier for substance abuse posts?')
sendPrompt('How do I use an LLM to classify and explain substance abuse risk in social posts?')
sendPrompt('How do I ensemble rule-based and LLM classifiers for risk detection?')
sendPrompt('How do I detect temporal spikes in substance abuse signals?')
sendPrompt('How do I cluster substance abuse topics using embeddings?')
sendPrompt('How do I analyze how substance abuse narratives evolve over time?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a RAG pipeline for explainable substance abuse risk summaries?')
g.text: Top-k supporting posts retrieved · LLM generates 3-sentence analyst summary · Evidence spans highlighted

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should my Streamlit dashboard show for substance abuse risk?')
sendPrompt('What alert system should I build for substance abuse spike detection?')
sendPrompt('What evaluation metrics should I use for my substance abuse classifier?')

g.text: Privacy constraints: no individual identification · aggregate outputs only · public datasets only · ethics-first design
